description: An object containing details of the individual's share of income from partnerships in the retrieved tax calculation.

totalPartnerIncome.description: The individual’s total income from partnership. This value must be between 0 and 99999999999.99 up to 2 decimal places.

listOfPartnerIncome.description: An array containing details of the individual's share of income from each partnership.

partnershipUtr.description:
A Unique Taxpayer Reference (UTR) for the partnership.

Must conform to the regular expression ^[0-9]{10}$

partnershipTrades.description: An array containing details of the partnership's trades.

lossesBroughtForwardAdjustedProfit.description: The amount of losses brought forward from earlier years set off against the tax year's adjusted profit. This value must be between 0 and 99999999999.99 up to 2 decimal places.

shareOfTaxableProfit.description: The individual's share of total taxable profit from the partnership's business for the tax year. This value must be between 0 and 99999999999.99 up to 2 decimal places.

adjustedLoss.description: The individual's share of the partnership's loss of the year, after all statutory adjustments (basis, accounting, averaging and foreign tax) have been applied. This value must be between 0 and 99999999999.99 up to 2 decimal places.

currentYearLossAppliedToGeneralIncome.description: The amount of the current tax year's loss set off against the individual's other income for the tax year. This value must be between 0 and 99999999999.99 up to 2 decimal places

transitionProfitArisingThisYear.description: The amount of transition profit treated as arising in the tax year. This value must be between 0 and 99999999999.99 up to 2 decimal places.

lossesBroughtForwardTransitionProfit.description: The amount of losses brought forward from earlier years set off against the tax year's amount of transition profit. This value must be between 0 and 99999999999.99 up to 2 decimal places.

nationalInsuranceContributions.description: Object containing details of Class 2 and Class 4 National Insurance contributions (NICs).

voluntaryClass2Nics.description: Indicate whether the individual wants to pay Class 2 NICs voluntarily to protect entitlement to certain benefits if profits are below the Small Profits Threshold.

class4Exemption.description: Indicate whether the individual is exempt from paying Class 4 NICs.

adjustmentToProfitsForClass4.description: The adjustment to the individual's profits specifically used to calculate Class 4 NICs. This value must be between 0 and 99999999999.99 up to 2 decimal places.

untaxedSavings.description: The total amount of untaxed savings income. This value must be between 0 and 99999999999.99 up to 2 decimal places.

taxedSavings.description: The total amount of taxed savings income. This value must be between 0 and 99999999999.99 up to 2 decimal places.

dividendIncome.description: The total amount of dividend income. This value must be between 0 and 99999999999.99 up to 2 decimal places.

ukPropertyIncome.description: Object containing details of the individual's share of the partnership's UK property income and related adjustments.

shareOfProfitOrLoss.description: The individual's share of the partnership's UK property profit or loss. This value must be between -99999999999.99 and 99999999999.99 up to 2 decimal places.

profitOrLossAdjustment.description: The adjustment to UK property profit or loss, including any adjustment for the tax year. This value must be between -99999999999.99 and 99999999999.99 up to 2 decimal places.

currentYearLossAppliedToGeneralIncome.description: The amount of the current tax year's UK property loss set off against the individual's other income for the tax year. This value must be between 0 and 99999999999.99 up to 2 decimal places.

taxedAndUntaxedIncome.description: The total amount of taxed and untaxed income from the partnership. This value must be between 0 and 99999999999.99 up to 2 decimal places.
